overlay_text_used: Confidence / Listening / SAFE PLACE TO LEARN
production_notes: First end-to-end run of registered-master mode after the merge-designs path was implemented (commit 69f252b). All steps succeeded except the FIRST commit attempt which returned 'transaction not found' — the transaction had expired between perform-editing-operations and commit-editing-transaction (likely due to TTL or system-reminder pauses). Retried with a fresh transaction, photo swap re-applied, immediate commit succeeded. Worth flagging in SKILL.md: keep perform-editing-operations and commit-editing-transaction in tight succession with no intermediate non-Canva tool calls.
review_notes: The new photo's composition differs from the master's original — kids+coach are positioned more centrally/lower in the frame. The text overlay 'CONFIDENCE / LISTENING / SAFE PLACE TO LEARN' now sits over the photo content rather than clean negative space below it. Architecture works mechanically; photo selection for THU should ideally have a similar bottom-area negative-space composition to match the master's design intent. Consider this a finding for asset capture guidance to Ram/Steph rather than a system bug.
